welcomeMentor.heading: Welcome
welcomeMentor.subheading: Methodological and technical support for researchers — no YesWeHack account or platform submission access.

mission.title: Your mentor role
mission.intro: Mentors support participants on methodological and technical aspects, with a progressive skills-building approach.

items.impact: Assessing relevance and impact of findings
items.review: Technical review before the reporting phase

mission.boundary: You do not have access to the YesWeHack account and do not take part in platform submission.

teams.title: Report teams
teams.subtitle: Join a team via the coordinator
teams.description: Report teams are assembled by the coordinator (hunter plus mentor or quality checker). You may request to join.
